scripts.data:validate: tsc --pretty false --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-data scripts/data_contract.ts scripts/validate_csv.ts scripts/csv_to_json.ts scripts/generate_csv_templates.ts && node .tmp-data/validate_csv.js
scripts.data:build: tsc --pretty false --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-data scripts/data_contract.ts scripts/validate_csv.ts scripts/csv_to_json.ts scripts/generate_csv_templates.ts && node .tmp-data/csv_to_json.js
scripts.data:templates: tsc --pretty false --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-data scripts/data_contract.ts scripts/generate_csv_templates.ts && node .tmp-data/generate_csv_templates.js
scripts.data:preflight: tsc --pretty false --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-data scripts/data_contract.ts scripts/validate_csv.ts scripts/generate_csv_templates.ts scripts/data_preflight.ts && node .tmp-data/data_preflight.js
scripts.verify: npm run data:validate && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build
